title: Jm's pvp pack
description: This is my resource pack i decided to upload, it has different textures such as sword, wool, shield, totem, glass and crit particles just to name a few. I have also change the way you hold a banner it will face you instead of away. More to come
body:
**This is a texture pack i made for myself to use and desided to upload it onto here it is made for pvp and i like to use it on bedwars and skywars**

## Mods you need

### For shield and banner
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)


## Textures i changed
**sword, 
wool,
totem,
shield,
armor,
particles,
no vignette, and
glass**

**there's more but i lowkey forgot lol**

# More to come :)
